## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] Camera-dependent behavior was mocked or manually tested

## Privacy and Data Safety

- [ ] No real face photos are included.
- [ ] No private screenshots or videos are included.
- [ ] No secrets are committed.
- [ ] README/docs were updated if behavior changed.

## Notes

Mention camera, OpenCV backend or platform-specific considerations.
